voxy-extra.config.nether_fog.start.toolt: Controls when the fog begins to appear (start multiplier).
voxy-extra.config.nether_fog.end.tooltip: Controls how far the fog extends (end multiplier).
voxy-extra.config.flashback_copy_lods.to: Enables copying LoDs to special folder (doesn't support combining replays). If turned off, LoD location will be written to metadata instead, which can't be ingested in the replay.
voxy-extra.config.flashback_ingest.toolt: Enables ingesting in compatible Flashback replays (which have LoD copied).
voxy-extra.config.linked_servers.tooltip:
Allows using a single LoD storage for multiple server addresses. Edit 'linked_servers' in voxy-extra.json

Format: [["Primary Address", "Alt Address", ...], [...]]
voxy-extra.config.server_blacklist.toolt:
Allows blacklisting servers to disable Voxy on them. Edit 'server_blacklist' in voxy-extra.json

Format: ["Address", "Address", ...]
